name: Tilly
description:
The Rat in the Walls
Plot: As it turns out, there's a whole city of man-eating rat people underneath your estate. Tilly, one of the city's residents, goes in and out of the city through a hole in the cellar's walls. This time she got stuck thanks to her fat ass.

Yet another character planned for the third installment of Sucker for Love. It goes without saying that she's going to see a massive overhaul when she appears officially.
creator: Flora Lumen
